name: G-Garde
description: Grue de chantier orbital reconvertie en machine de guerre. Son bras articulé soulève les véhicules ennemis comme des jouets. Crochet de grue = arme de destruction massive.
prompt: Sci-fi scrap-punk military crane mech, converted orbital construction crane with massive articulated arm and giant hook, armored base with welded scrap plates, grabbing an enemy vehicle mid-air, industrial sparks and hydraulic steam, highly detailed, dramatic
